# Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer (ROR Developer) for Hire | Navin Kumar

> **Experienced freelance Ruby on Rails developer (ROR developer) available for hire** — 9+ years building scalable SaaS platforms, REST APIs, microservices, and cloud-native systems on AWS and Azure. Remote worldwide. Rails 5, 6 & 7. Open to contract, retainer, and consulting engagements.

## Hire a Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer

Looking for a **freelance Ruby on Rails developer**, a **Ruby on Rails contractor**, a **senior Rails engineer for hire**, or a **remote Ruby developer**? Navin Kumar is available for remote contract work worldwide.

He works with:
- **Startups** building their first Rails SaaS product
- **Scale-ups** migrating a monolith to microservices
- **Enterprises** needing a senior Rails contractor or fractional tech lead
- **Product teams** needing ongoing retainer-based Ruby development

**Contact to hire:** navinkumar2508@gmail.com | +91 97386 77711

---

## Ruby on Rails Expertise

**Rails versions:** Rails 5, Rails 6, Rails 7 (including Hotwire, Turbo, Stimulus)

**Backend gems & tools:**
- Sidekiq (background job processing)
- Devise (authentication)
- Pundit / CanCanCan (authorisation / RBAC)
- RSpec / FactoryBot (testing)
- ActiveRecord, ActiveJob, ActionCable
- Grape (API framework)
- Capistrano (deployment)

**APIs & integrations:**
- RESTful API design and development
- GraphQL APIs
- Stripe / payment gateway integration
- OAuth2 / JWT / SSO integration
- Third-party API integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, etc.)

**Databases:**
- PostgreSQL (primary), MySQL
- Redis (caching, queues, sessions)
- MongoDB
- Elasticsearch (full-text search)
- Database query optimisation, indexing, N+1 elimination

**Cloud & DevOps:**
- AWS: EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, CloudFormation, Glue, SQS, ElastiCache
- Azure: VMs, App Service, CosmosDB
- Docker, Docker Compose
- GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI
- Terraform, infrastructure as code

---

## Services Offered

### 1. Freelance Ruby on Rails Development
Full-stack and backend Rails development — REST APIs, background jobs, database design, performance tuning, and feature delivery. Available as a dedicated freelance Rails developer or alongside your existing team.

### 2. Ruby on Rails API Development
Design and build scalable REST or GraphQL APIs in Rails — versioning, authentication, rate limiting, serialisation, and documentation.

### 3. Microservices Architecture & Migration
Monolith-to-microservices migration strategy and execution. Service decomposition, inter-service communication (REST, gRPC, events), and data consistency patterns.

### 4. SaaS Platform Development
End-to-end SaaS development in Rails: multi-tenancy (Apartment/ActsAsTenant), subscription billing (Stripe), role-based access control, onboarding flows, and third-party integrations.

### 5. Rails Performance Optimisation
Profiling slow Rails apps — N+1 query elimination, database indexing, Redis caching, Sidekiq tuning, and load testing. Typical result: 20–40% response time reduction.

### 6. Legacy Rails Upgrade
Upgrade legacy Rails apps from Rails 4/5 to Rails 6/7. Dependency upgrades, deprecation fixes, test suite repair, and deployment.

### 7. Cloud Infrastructure (AWS / Azure)
Cloud architecture, infrastructure-as-code with AWS CloudFormation, CI/CD pipeline setup, container orchestration, and deployment automation for Rails apps.

### 8. Engineering Leadership & Team Augmentation
Fractional Engineering Manager or Tech Lead. Sprint planning, architecture decisions, code reviews, mentorship, and cross-team alignment. Works well for teams of 3–15 engineers.

### 9. Rails Code Review & Architecture Audit
One-time deep audit of your Rails codebase — security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, test coverage gaps, and architectural weaknesses. Delivered as a written report with prioritised recommendations.

---

## Why Hire This Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer

- **9+ years** of professional Ruby on Rails experience (Rails 5, 6, 7)
- Led engineering teams serving **10,000+ enterprise users** at CloudBolt Software
- Delivered **~30% performance improvements** through caching and DB query optimisation
- Maintained **99.9%+ uptime** on production SaaS systems
- Proven track record at a funded enterprise SaaS company
- Available for **remote work** across US, EU, and APAC time zones
- Strong communication — works well with technical and non-technical stakeholders
- Clean, tested, documented code (RSpec, CI/CD, Git flow)

---

## About

Freelance Ruby on Rails developer and Engineering Leader Navin Kumar is based in Deoghar, Jharkhand, India. He has 9+ years of experience building scalable SaaS platforms, REST APIs, microservices, and cloud-native systems using Ruby on Rails, AWS, and Azure.

He is currently a Lead Software Engineer at CloudBolt Software (enterprise cloud management SaaS) and is **open to freelance and contract engagements** alongside or exclusively depending on scope.

---

## Professional Experience

### Lead Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software (June 2022 – Present)
CloudBolt is an enterprise cloud management SaaS platform (Ruby on Rails backend).
- Led a team of 5+ engineers delivering features to 10,000+ enterprise users
- Spearheaded monolith-to-microservices migration
- Improved CI/CD deployment cadence from bi-weekly to weekly
- Reduced API response time by ~30% via Redis caching and DB tuning
- Maintained 99.9%+ system uptime

### Senior Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software (October 2020 – June 2022)
- Designed scalable REST APIs and backend services in Rails
- Automated infrastructure provisioning with AWS CloudFormation
- Mentored junior Rails developers

### Senior Software Development Engineer — MyUpchar.com (September 2019 – October 2020)
- Built Rails backend for e-commerce and warehouse automation
- 40% efficiency improvement via backend workflow automation

### Software Engineer — Kreatio Software Pvt Ltd (August 2016 – March 2019)
- Built Ruby on Rails applications and RESTful services
- AWS/Azure deployments and performance optimisation

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Are you available as a freelance Ruby on Rails developer?**
A: Yes. Available for remote freelance Rails development, contract work, and consulting worldwide.

**Q: What Rails versions do you work with?**
A: Rails 5, 6, and 7 — including Hotwire, Turbo, and Stimulus for modern Rails frontends.

**Q: Do you work with startups?**
A: Yes — from greenfield Rails SaaS builds to post-seed scale-up engineering.

**Q: What is your engagement model?**
A: Project-based (fixed scope), hourly contract, or monthly retainer. Email navinkumar2508@gmail.com for rates and availability.

**Q: Are you available across US/EU time zones?**
A: Yes — fully remote, available across EST, PST, CET, GMT, and APAC time zones.

**Q: How do I hire you?**
A: Email navinkumar2508@gmail.com with your project description. Response within 24 hours.

## Engagement Models

| Model | Best For |
|---|---|
| Project-based | Fixed scope: feature build, migration, audit |
| Hourly contract | Flexible ongoing work, bug fixes, consultations |
| Monthly retainer | Dedicated part-time or full-time Rails developer |
| Team augmentation | Embedded senior engineer within your team |
| Fractional Tech Lead | Part-time engineering leadership and architecture |

## Tech Stack Summary

```
Language:    Ruby 3.x
Framework:   Ruby on Rails 5 / 6 / 7
Frontend:    Hotwire, Turbo, Stimulus, ERB, basic React
Databases:   PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch
Background:  Sidekiq, DelayedJob, ActiveJob
Cloud:       AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, SQS, CloudFormation), Azure
DevOps:      Docker, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Capistrano
Testing:     RSpec, FactoryBot, Capybara
Auth:        Devise, JWT, OAuth2, SSO
API:         REST, GraphQL, Grape
```
